coverage_expectations.unit: Validate local schema, service catalog mapping, and scope profile selection.
coverage_expectations.contract: Validate request/response payload shape for each planned API operation.
coverage_expectations.integration-sandbox: Use a non-production Google Cloud project and disposable resources.
coverage_expectations.e2e-preview: Run user-visible flows with test accounts and read-back verification.
coverage_expectations.security: Verify OAuth consent, key restrictions, secret storage, and logging redaction.
coverage_expectations.quota-error: Exercise 400, 401, 403, 429, and 5xx paths with deterministic stubs.
coverage_expectations.consent-gate: Verify mutating operations cannot run without explicit confirmation.
